zh.title: 应用设置
zh.exportInventorySummary: 将库存账导出为 Excel 文件
zh.importInventorySummary: 从 Excel 文件导入并覆盖当前库存账
zh.aboutBody: VibeRack 是面向智能物料管理的 Android 应用，用于组件入库、容器槽位管理、库存账、找料点灯、BOM 拣料点灯和智能底盘硬件恢复。
zh.stackBody:
Android 原生 Kotlin + Compose，依赖通过应用级容器管理，本地业务库使用 Room + SQLite，设置存储使用 DataStore。
作者: BrokenClient@foxmail.com
QQ群: 1098077458

en.title: Settings
en.exportInventorySummary: Export the stock ledger as an Excel file
en.importInventorySummary: Import from an Excel file and overwrite the current stock ledger
en.aboutBody: VibeRack is an Android app for smart component management: component stock-in, container slots, stock ledger, find-by-light, BOM pick-to-light, and smart chassis hardware restore.
en.stackBody:
Native Android Kotlin + Compose, with dependencies managed through an application-level container. Room + SQLite is used for local business data, DataStore stores settings.
Author: BrokenClient@foxmail.com
QQ group: 1098077458
